title: Tiempo pasado
description: Hablar de acciones y estados pasados.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'd like a sandwich, please.
items.translation: Quisiera un sándwich, por favor.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L18-02 - E1182 - Ethan - I'd like a sandwich, please.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: These books are for beginners.
items.translation: Estos libros son para principiantes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L43-03 - E1433 - Clerk - These books are for beginners.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: The museum was very big.
items.translation: El museo era muy grande.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L49-01 - E1491 - Mia - The museum was very big.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: The old cars were interesting.
items.translation: Los autos antiguos eran interesantes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L49-03 - E1493 - Noah - The old cars were interesting.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Were you tired after the visit?
items.translation: ¿Estabas cansado después de la visita?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L49-04 - E1494 - Emma - Were you tired after the visit.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: What did you do yesterday?
items.translation: ¿Qué hiciste ayer?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L50-01 - E1501 - Noah - What did you do yesterday.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: The weather was perfect yesterday.
items.translation: El clima estuvo perfecto ayer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L05-01 - E2051 - Mia - The weather was perfect yesterday.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: I was swimming when you arrived.
items.translation: Yo estaba nadando cuando llegaste.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L05-02 - E2052 - Noah - I was swimming when you arrived.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Emma was reading under a tree.
items.translation: Emma estaba leyendo bajo un árbol.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L05-03 - E2053 - Ethan - Emma was reading under a tree.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: Was anyone fishing?
items.translation: ¿Alguien estaba pescando?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L05-05 - E2055 - Sofia - Was anyone fishing.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Yes, my uncle was fishing near the bridge.
items.translation: Sí, mi tío estaba pescando cerca del puente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L05-06 - E2056 - Noah - Yes, my uncle was fishing near the bridge.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: It was Noah.
items.translation: Era Noah.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L06-02 - E2062 - Ethan - It was Noah.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: He was walking home when he saw a lost dog.
items.translation: Estaba caminando a casa cuando vio un perro perdido.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L06-04 - E2064 - Ethan - He was walking home when he saw a lost dog.mp3

items.speaker: Worker
items.text: Have you visited an animal shelter before?
items.translation: ¿Han visitado antes un refugio de animales?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L07-01 - E2071 - Worker - Have you visited an animal shelter before.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I've volunteered at one before.
items.translation: He trabajado como voluntaria en uno antes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L07-03 - E2073 - Mia - I've volunteered at one before.mp3

items.speaker: Teacher
items.text: This camera is lighter than that one.
items.translation: Esta cámara es más ligera que aquella.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L11-01 - E2111 - Teacher - This camera is lighter than that one.mp3

items.speaker: Teacher
items.text: The smaller one is easier for beginners.
items.translation: La más pequeña es más fácil para principiantes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L11-04 - E2114 - Teacher - The smaller one is easier for beginners.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'd like a coffee without sugar.
items.translation: Quisiera un café sin azúcar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L14-03 - E2143 - Ethan - I'd like a coffee without sugar.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Have you used that website before?
items.translation: ¿Has usado ese sitio antes?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-02 - E2182 - Ethan - Have you used that website before.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: I think I did fairly well.
items.translation: Creo que lo hice bastante bien.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L25-05 - E2255 - Sofia - I think I did fairly well.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: The stage looks bigger than yesterday.
items.translation: El escenario se ve más grande que ayer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-03 - E2293 - Sofia - The stage looks bigger than yesterday.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: You've just finished your first performance!
items.translation: ¡Acabas de terminar tu primera presentación!
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L30-01 - E2301 - Mia - You've just finished your first performance!.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I thought it was an animal.
items.translation: Pensé que era un animal.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L34-02 - E2342 - Mia - I thought it was an animal.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: The wind was getting stronger.
items.translation: El viento se estaba volviendo más fuerte.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L34-04 - E2344 - Emma - The wind was getting stronger.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I was making tea at the time.
items.translation: Yo estaba preparando té en ese momento.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L35-02 - E2352 - Mia - I was making tea at the time.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: The forest was much quieter than the city.
items.translation: El bosque era mucho más tranquilo que la ciudad.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-01 - E2361 - Mia - The forest was much quieter than the city.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: The cabin was less comfortable than my house.
items.translation: La cabaña era menos cómoda que mi casa.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-03 - E2363 - Emma - The cabin was less comfortable than my house.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: The air was much cleaner there.
items.translation: El aire era mucho más limpio allá.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-04 - E2364 - Ethan - The air was much cleaner there.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I haven't had a job before.
items.translation: No he tenido un trabajo antes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L38-05 - E2385 - Ethan - I haven't had a job before.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: You have to arrive ten minutes early.
items.translation: Tienes que llegar diez minutos antes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L40-01 - E2401 - Manager - You have to arrive ten minutes early.mp3

items.speaker: Customer
items.text: I bought this yesterday, but it's damaged.
items.translation: Compré esto ayer, pero está dañado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L42-01 - E2421 - Customer - I bought this yesterday, but it's damaged.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'd like to deposit fifty dollars.
items.translation: Quisiera depositar cincuenta dólares.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L44-04 - E2444 - Ethan - I'd like to deposit fifty dollars.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: If I had more time, I would do both.
items.translation: Si tuviera más tiempo, haría ambas cosas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L45-01 - E2451 - Ethan - If I had more time, I would do both.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: If I were you, I'd talk to your manager.
items.translation: Si yo fuera tú, hablaría con tu gerente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L45-04 - E2454 - Noah - If I were you, I'd talk to your manager.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: If I had enough money, I'd travel around Europe.
items.translation: Si tuviera suficiente dinero, viajaría por Europa.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L46-04 - E2464 - Emma - If I had enough money, I'd travel around Europe.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: How many students may participate?
items.translation: ¿Cuántos estudiantes podrían participar?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L47-04 - E2474 - Noah - How many students may participate.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Only ten students will be selected.
items.translation: Solo diez estudiantes serán seleccionados.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L47-05 - E2475 - Mr. Carter - Only ten students will be selected.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I'll check it before you submit it.
items.translation: Lo revisaré antes de que lo entregues.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L48-06 - E2486 - Emma - I'll check it before you submit it.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Have the students been selected already?
items.translation: ¿Ya fueron seleccionados los estudiantes?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L49-02 - E2492 - Ethan - Have the students been selected already.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I can't believe I've been accepted.
items.translation: No puedo creer que fui aceptado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L49-04 - E2494 - Ethan - I can't believe I've been accepted.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Do you remember seeing it before?
items.translation: ¿Recuerdas haberla visto antes?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L06-03 - BR1063 - Leo - Do you remember seeing it before.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: What do you think of the first version?
items.translation: ¿Qué opinas de la primera versión?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L20-01 - BR1201 - Ava - What do you think of the first version.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: That's really good for our first post.
items.translation: Eso es muy bueno para nuestra primera publicación.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L24-05 - BR1245 - Nora - That's really good for our first post.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Please confirm before eight.
items.translation: Por favor confirma antes de las ocho.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L26-05 - BR1265 - Leo - Please confirm before eight.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Not gonna lie, the first video was better.
items.translation: No voy a mentir: el primer video era mejor.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L41-01 - BR1411 - Leo - Not gonna lie, the first video was better.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: I literally said that yesterday.
items.translation: Literalmente dije eso ayer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L42-04 - BR1424 - Nora - I literally said that yesterday.mp3
